brief.rationale: Aisha is plant_based / vegan-tagged. The body mentions beef — should fail dietary_contradiction only.

email.subject_a: Aisha's smoky beef rib just landed, {{first_name}}
email.subject_b: Aisha's plate dropped tonight — early-access window
email.body: Aisha's smoky beef rib is here, {{first_name}} — and it's not asking for permission. Char, yaji spice, scotch-bonnet kick — the kind of finish that makes the fork work overtime. Not a kit. Just dinner — already cooked by a chef who treats salsa like a base note. Two minutes to plate, full at four. [Add to plan]({{short_url}})

sms.body: Hey {{first_name}} — Aisha just dropped a smoky beef rib. Char, yaji, done in 2. Tap → {{short_url}}

push.title: Aisha's smoky rib just landed
push.body: Tap to add it before Sunday's cutoff.
